title: meehania simplex
intro: Meehania simplex, also known as Chinese artichoke or Chinese chrysanthemum bitters, is a perennial plant native to China and Japan, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, Meehania simplex has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Meehania simplex include its ability to aid digestion, relieve headaches and fever, and support the immune system. Meehania simplex is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
